title: Social Worker
description: A social worker in India spends most of their day interacting with marginalized communities, conducting assessments, developing intervention plans, and advocating for policy changes. They often work in government offices, NGOs, or community centers, and may face challenges such as limited resources, bureaucratic red tape, and societal stigma. Despite these challenges, social workers play a crucial role in improving the lives of vulnerable populations and promoting social justice.

career_progression.year_0_2: Initial years involve internships, volunteer work, and entry-level positions in NGOs, government offices, or community centers. Social workers may also pursue postgraduate studies to specialize in areas like child welfare, mental health, or disability rights.
career_progression.year_3_5: As experience grows, social workers may take on leadership roles, develop and implement programs, and collaborate with other professionals. They may also pursue certifications or advanced degrees to enhance their skills and career prospects.
career_progression.year_6_10: Senior social workers may hold key positions in government, NGOs, or private organizations, influencing policy and program development. They may also engage in research, advocacy, or teaching.
career_progression.entrepreneurship_exit: Social workers may start their own NGOs, community centers, or consulting firms to address specific social issues or provide specialized services.
career_progression.global_pathway: Indian social workers may pursue international opportunities in organizations like the United Nations, non-governmental organizations (NGOs), or international development agencies.

india_social_context.first_year_reality: Starting out as a social worker in India can be challenging due to limited job opportunities, low salaries, and high expectations from families and society.
common_misconceptions: Social work is a low-paying career
Social work is only for those who want to work with children
Social work is a easy career
